summary.lv: GR8_TECH – iGaming B2B platformas nodrošinātājs – meklē L2 tehniskā atbalsta speciālistu, lai apkalpotu operatoru klientus un risinātu sarežģītus platformas jautājumus.
summary.en: GR8_TECH, an iGaming B2B platform provider, seeks an L2 Technical Support Specialist to handle operator client issues and resolve complex platform-level support cases.
